query:
UPDATE games 
SET publishedModel = 1
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND modelTotal IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN publishedModel = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as published,
  SUM(CASE WHEN publishedModel = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM games WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-19';
